rules.rule: every page layout MUST cite composition_id and page_index (1-based, deterministic).
every block on a page MUST declare role ∈ SECTION_ROLES and a stable block_id.
image blocks MUST cite asset_id (layer 43) AND grounding_id (layer 42); orphan visual blocks BLOCK composition approval.
warning blocks MUST be placed before the procedural block they warn about; warning-after-procedural is fail-closed.
specification tables MUST be grouped within a single section_composition; cross-section split is FORBIDDEN unless reviewer attests.
visual density per page MUST stay within reviewer-declared ceiling (default max_visuals_per_page = 6).
section overflow is handled by adding pages with explicit continuation_of links; silent splitting is FORBIDDEN.
page layouts are append-only; in-place mutation is FORBIDDEN.
